productDisplayName: Highlander Men Blue Checked Haddon Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionSteel blue and white plaid check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has red and grey accents, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest, full length buttoned placket with brand tab near the hem, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this steel blue and white plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up to give a different look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
